title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nature's Basket Holdings Services family as a Backend Developer in Aurangabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
